overall.description: First-person exploration of a derelict abandoned hospital or asylum in a horror video game. The player navigates through graffiti-covered corridors illuminated by red emergency lights and flickering fluorescent tubes, passing medical equipment, debris, and a body on a gurney.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned hospital corridor with red emergency lighting

events.description: camera turns right to face a doorway while continuing to walk forward

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the red-lit corridor, approaching a gated doorway with an exit sign overhead

entered.detail: illuminated red exit sign mounted above the doorway at the end of the corridor
walls covered in black spray-painted graffiti and tags
metal security gate blocking the doorway at the end of the hall
scattered rubble and trash covering the dirty concrete floor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow abandoned hospital corridor bathed in red emergency light. The player moves forward toward a metal gate blocking the exit, with graffiti-covered walls on both sides and debris scattered across the floor. The camera turns right near the end, revealing a side doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark corridor transitioning to red-lit hallway

events.description: corridor becomes nearly pitch black as lights fade completely
red emergency lights become visible again illuminating a wheelchair ahead

agents.ego_description: moving through a pitch-black section of corridor before red emergency lights reveal the path ahead

entered.detail: empty medical wheelchair sitting in the middle of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a section of near-total darkness before red emergency lights illuminate another stretch of corridor. An empty wheelchair sits ominously in the center of the hallway as the player approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned hospital corridor with medical waste and body on gurney

events.description: fluorescent ceiling lights illuminate the corridor revealing more details of the decay
player discovers a body covered by a green sheet on a hospital gurney

agents.ego_description: cautiously approaching a gurney with a body covered by a green sheet, then continuing down the corridor

notable_agents.action: dead body lying motionless on a gurney covered by a green sheet with a hand visible

entered.detail: wall sign with arrow pointing left reading EMERGENCY
medical gurney with a body covered by a green sheet
row of empty waiting room chairs against the wall
flickering overhead fluorescent light fixtures illuminating the corridor

segments.scene_description: The corridor brightens with fluorescent lighting as the player advances. A disturbing discovery is made: a body covered by a green sheet lies on a gurney against the left wall, with an emergency sign visible nearby. The player continues past the grim scene into the deteriorating hallway.

scene_state.functional_zone: hospital waiting area with elevators and scattered medical equipment

events.description: entering wider lobby area with elevator bank and waiting chairs
passing through area with red emergency lighting visible on the right side

agents.ego_description: navigating through the main corridor, passing waiting chairs and elevator doors while surveying the debris

entered.detail: pair of closed elevator doors with call buttons on the side
wall-mounted information board with text and diagrams
metal medical supply cart with shelves
larger piles of rubble and discarded materials scattered across the floor

segments.scene_description: The space opens into a wider hospital lobby area featuring an elevator bank on the right and waiting chairs along the walls. The lighting mixes fluorescent and red emergency lights. Medical carts and significant debris piles litter the floor as the player explores the abandoned space.

scene_state.functional_zone: back corridor leading to medical examination room with sinks

events.description: entering side room with medical sinks and tiled walls
approaching dirty medical sinks with shelves of supplies above them

agents.ego_description: entering a side room with medical sinks and examining the fixtures and shelves

entered.detail: pair of dirty white porcelain medical sinks with rust stains
metal shelves above the sinks holding medical supplies and bottles
blue fabric privacy curtain on a metal track
wooden desk with an office chair behind it

segments.scene_description: The player moves through another red-lit corridor and enters a side room containing medical examination equipment. The room features dirty sinks with shelves of supplies, a privacy curtain, and a desk. The camera focuses on the sinks as the exploration continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a derelict hospital that shifts from claustrophobic, red-lit corridors into a wider lobby and finally into a detailed examination room. It begins by moving through a narrow hallway bathed in red emergency light and scattered debris, turning right at a metal gate to enter a stretch of near-total darkness. As the camera advances, the red glow returns to reveal an empty wheelchair before the lighting shifts to harsh fluorescent tubes, illuminating a body covered by a green sheet on a gurney. The scene then expands into a wide lobby area where mixed red and white lighting falls over an elevator bank and piles of medical waste, before turning back into a red-lit passage. Finally, the camera enters a side room, moving past a privacy curtain and a desk to focus on dirty sinks and shelves of medical supplies.
